event: Interior view of the Field Marshal's Hall in the Winter Palace, Saint Petersburg
description: A grand interior view of the Field Marshal's Hall in the Winter Palace, Saint Petersburg. The vast hall features soaring white columns, an ornate coffered ceiling, and enormous crystal chandeliers that dominate the space with golden light. Large battle paintings hang on the walls between the columns. Figures in military and court dress walk through the polished hall, dwarfed by the monumental architecture. The composition emphasizes the imperial grandeur and military prestige of the Russian Empire.

_meta.title: The Field Marshal's Hall of the Winter Palace
